item.title: The Fellowship of the Ring
item.description:
Another long flight back? The perfect time to rewatch the Lord of the Rings.

Or perhaps just one of them–with the Extended Edition. Man those are long movies (especially in that version).

And man, I forgot just how awe inspiring those movies are.

It all began with the forging of the Great Rings.

It’s the tale of a little man (literally in this case) on a mission oh so very much larger than him–and even larger still; than perhaps he realizes.

item.title: Ocean's Eleven
item.description:
It’s been a while since I watched these movies. But hey, when you’re on a plane for five hours and they have a screen full of movies? Worth!

In a nutshell–it’s a quintessential heist movie. Gather the crew, plan the heist, deal with what goes wrong, and walk away in the end victorious. And then show the audience how in the world you actually pulled it off.

Building the crew? Great.
